title: Tower T19007 3-in-1 Electric Can Opener with Knife Sharpener & Bottle Opener, Black
features: 3-IN-1 DESIGN: Make daily meal prep even easier with this multi-functional, hands free can opener featuring built-in knife sharpener and bottle opener
MAGNETIC LID HOLDER: Secures the lid in place without falling into the cans contents, until you’re ready to safely dispose of it
BUILT-IN KNIFE SHARPENER: Helps keep your kitchen knives razor sharp, so you’ll never be food prepping with dull blunt blades again
UP TO 900G: Suitable for all your favourite canned food weighing up to 900g, so you can take the effort out of all of your food prep needs
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products All-in-one trendy kitchen appliance for daily meal prep This trendy kitchen appliance helps make daily prep even easier, helping keep knives razor sharp. Its magnetic lid holder secures the lid in place without falling into the cans contents. It’s suitable for all canned food weighing up to 900g, so you can take the effort out of all of your food prep needs. Easily remove the can opener blades from the appliance for a simple wipe clean. And, its compact design and easy cord storage means you can easily keep your countertops tidy after cooking. 3-in-1 electric can opener with built-in knife sharpener and bottle opener Easy to use design opens cans at the push of a button Detachable cutting head 60cm power cord Suitable for cans up to 900g Magnetic lid holder secures the lid ready for safe disposal Hidden cord storage keeps work surfaces free from trailing wires Item dimensions: H23 x W12 x D13cm BUILT-IN KNIFE SHARPENER Keeps your kitchen knives razor sharp 3-IN-1 DESIGN Includes hands free can opener, built-in knife sharpener and bottle opener MAGNETIC LID HOLDER Secures the lid ready for safe disposal
